{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Redmoon Hall cloudship
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A hand of dense [[shadow madra]] pushed the [[Redmoon Hall cloudship]] back.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Redmoon Hall cloudship]] has a broken cloud base.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
